summary: P0 fix verification complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Connettori page shows v1.7.1, download works, installation guide displays diagnostica.ps1 script. ZIP package contains simplified .bat launcher and v1.7.1 version.json.

console_warnings.message: React setState warning in LoginPage during render - minor issue, does not affect functionality
Recharts chart width/height warning during initial render
WebSocket connection to wss://...ws/alerts failed - expected in test environment

backend_api_tests: GET /api/connector/update-check with X-API-Key returns update_available: true and latest_version: 1.7.1
GET /api/connector/update-check without API key returns 200 (allows anonymous check)
POST /api/connector/heartbeat with X-API-Key updates connector status
GET /86NocConnector.zip (public download) returns 200 with file size > 50KB
frontend_ui_tests: Aggiornamento Automatico section shows v1.7.1 as current version
Download ZIP button visible and links to /86NocConnector.zip
Installation guide toggle works - shows 3 steps
Version input field present with placeholder 'es. 1.1.0'
Publish button disabled when no version entered
Add device form opens and closes correctly
Summary cards show Totale, Online, Offline counts
zip_package_verification: diagnostica.ps1 script present in src/ folder

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_HEARTBEAT_HOST connector during heartbeat test, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 connector fix verified. Backend endpoints all working: heartbeat, update-check, update-info, download. Frontend Connettori page displays v1.7.1 correctly. ZIP package verified to contain simplified .bat and diagnostica.ps1. Note: IFIXITGESTSRV3 connector not visible because it's on client's actual server and hasn't sent heartbeat - this is expected behavior. The connector status list is empty in test environment.

p0_fix_verification.issue: Windows connector OFFLINE - showing v1.6.1 instead of v1.7.0
p0_fix_verification.root_cause: ZIP package had incorrect (old complex) .bat launcher file
p0_fix_verification.fix_applied: Rebuilt ZIP to v1.7.1 with simplified .bat and added diagnostica.ps1 script

verification_results.frontend_display: Shows v1.7.1 in download section - VERIFIED

p0_fix_verification.note: Actual connector on client server (IFIXITGESTSRV3) cannot be tested from here - requires manual verification on client's Windows server
